A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

who is your favorite pariprashnena user?

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-08-27 · 11 answers
after me of course.
user [40] · 2007-08-27
I will only vote if its anonymous
user [2] · 2007-08-27
here is my vote: Stinking Demon, for being so straightforward. And, hey, certainly stands out of the crowd with his red photo in the profile. Original.
user [112] · 2007-08-27
It is great that many mature devotees are here :o).
But one thing I noticed, that "some devotees" who are coming here in challenging mood started to use another nick...funny.
user [40] · 2007-08-27
Janmasthami brought the most traffic and advertising thats gotta count
user [78] · 2007-08-27
Everyone who is commenting is my favorite user, hehe:D
user [19] · 2007-08-27
Mines are Servant Krsna and Saryu.

The polemic ones: Stinking Karmi demon and Bhakta Corey from the early days. Tulsiananda is funny sometimes with all his passion.
user [131] · 2007-09-01
While Prubhus gone i would vote 1 Veda, i like to pretend to have already known what he answers (the main Sankalpa behind my chanting today was to be able to create a Q that Sadhu couldnt answer!!)
and of course the karmi demons r always there in the top 5:-) :-) :-)
Hare Krsna
user [40] · 2007-10-10
Govindas is certainly getting my vote this month
user [2] · 2007-10-10
My positive vote for the 30+ posts "PARIPRASHNENA IS A WASTE OF TIME" from Tulsiananda.
Oh, wait, they have been deleted!!!
Must be that admins are biased :)
user [40] · 2007-10-10
Yeah I was voting for him at first, but for me deleted posts means a disqualification for this month, try again next month
user [152] · 2007-10-15
Priyavarata Prabhu, because he can tell it As It Is.
